scope_override.approved_by: PM (dispatch orchestrator, review round on PR #1180)
scope_override.reason: This manifest was created before UTV2-1495's hard file-scope guard merged to main. That guard's trust boundary locks a newly-introduced manifest to the content of the commit that first added it, so the lane's own docs/06_status/proof/UTV2-1467/** proof paths (already required by expected_proof_paths since lane-start) were not recognized as declared scope once the branch synced with main post-UTV2-1495. This override widens file_scope_lock to include only the lane's own pre-existing proof-directory paths that were always part of its required deliverables, matching what UTV2-1495 itself established as the documented override precedent (see its own manifest, docs/06_status/lanes/UTV2-1495.json). No unrelated production code is introduced.
